mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO single_party ( algorithm_type, task_name, project_id, resource_id, selected_features, algorithm_params, result_path, remarks, user_id, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{algorithmType}, #{taskName}, #{projectId}, #{resourceId}, #{selectedFeatures}, #{algorithmParams}, #{resultPath}, #{remarks}, #{userId}, 0, now(), now() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
mapper.update: UPDATE single_party_task SET task_state = #{taskState}, result_rows = #{resultRows}, result_file_path = #{resultFilePath}, execution_log = #{executionLog}, update_date = now() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
